title: ourisia macrophylla subsp. robusta
intro: Ourisia macrophylla subsp. robusta, also known as the robust large-leaved forget-me-not, is a sub-species of the flowering plant Ourisia macrophylla native to New Zealand. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Ourisia macrophylla subsp. robusta include its potential to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water, creating a tea that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
